slices.name: Rémi de Juvigny
slices.intro:
I'm a software engineer based in Paris. I currently work at Strapi, building the leading open-source headless CMS.

I love building things for the web and sharing what I learn along the way.

slices.title: Work
slices.content:
• Strapi — Software engineer since 2020. Building the leading open-source headless CMS.
  • HETIC — Taught web development to master's students in 2021.
  • Revolt Influence — Fullstack developer in 2019. Built an influencer marketing platform.
  • MadKudu — Frontend engineering intern in San Francisco, 2018.
